name: splunk-knowledge
description: Marketplace for Splunk knowledge plugins. Hosts splunk-dashboards (Dashboard Studio authoring) and splunk-spl (SPL syntax reference).

plugins.name: splunk-dashboards
plugins.description: End-to-end toolkit for Splunk Dashboard Studio (v2). 60+ skills covering pipeline, visualizations, interactivity, design references, and SVG generation.

plugins.name: splunk-spl
plugins.description: SPL syntax reference with 21 silent-fail traps and 150 per-command reference files sourced from Splunk 10.2.

plugins.name: splunk-viz-packs
plugins.description: Build fully themed Splunk custom visualization apps with shared design tokens, Canvas 2D rendering, and AppInspect-ready packaging. 5 skills covering orchestration, scaffolding, per-viz Canvas source, and 20 hard rules from shipping real apps.
